prompt: Create a vertical cyberpunk streetwear fashion poster of a young model crouching low on a Tokyo-inspired rooftop at twilight, shot from a dramatic low angle with the neon green chunky sneaker oversized in the foreground. The model has neon pink messy shoulder-length hair and bold urban styling, with the face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. Outfit: a reflective metallic silver oversized puffer jacket with crinkled mirror texture catching magenta and cyan highlights, black cargo pants with buckles, straps, and hanging webbing, and neon lime green futuristic platform sneakers. Background: dense futuristic Tokyo skyline with dark blue-purple sky, glowing skyscrapers, rooftop railings, and Tokyo Tower illuminated in orange-red behind the model. Add strong glitch-art effects: horizontal magenta, cyan, green, and white scanline artifacts across the frame, especially around the headline and bottom edge. Place a huge distressed white all-caps headline at the top reading FUTURE READY, split across two lines, with digital fragmentation and broken pixel edges. Include exactly 6 visible neon sign elements: 1 vertical hot-pink Japanese sign on the left reading 「未来準備完了」, 1 small lower-left sign reading 「東京」 with “TOKYO” beneath it, 1 vertical hot-pink sign on the right with a cat face icon plus Japanese text and “2077”, 1 small cyan-pink sign near the lower right reading “ネオン”, 1 blue sign at the bottom right reading “GAME OVER”, and 1 small glowing cyan city sign in the far background. Use high-contrast cinematic lighting, saturated magenta and electric blue reflections, glossy wet rooftop surface, gritty urban texture, sharp fashion-editorial detail, and a 2:3 poster composition with no border or watermark.
